findings.description: The constraint that this work should be performed by the UI infrastructure person (UI開発基盤の担当者) and does not need to be done individually by each developer is entirely absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: 「なお、この作業は、UI開発基盤の担当者が実施すればよく、各担当者が個別に実施する必要はない。」

findings.location: Section 1: UI開発基盤の更新方針
findings.description: The entire update policy section is absent from the knowledge file. This section contains: (1) that Nablarch continues to fix bugs and add features to standard plugins after project adoption; (2) that changes can be incorporated per plugin, minimizing work effort and impact; (3) the critical note that post-incorporation operation verification is the project's responsibility (Nablarch cannot account for project-side customizations).
findings.source_evidence: 「ただし、PJ側の拡張や既存機能への影響に関して、Nablarch側では把握することができないので、取り込み後の動作確認等はPJ側で担保する必要がある。」

findings.location: Section 2: 作業時のディレクトリ構成
findings.description: The prerequisite step of obtaining the latest Nablarch standard plugin bundle and arranging it in the same directory structure as described in initial_setup is entirely missing from the knowledge file. This is a required setup action before any update work begins.
findings.source_evidence: 「最新バージョンのNablarch標準プラグインのバンドルを取得し、:doc:`./initial_setup` の **UI開発基盤の取得と展開** で述べたディレクトリ構造と同じ構造になるように配置する。」
